'''âb-y-t''' ('''bayata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macrocode|macrocode]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macrocode|macrocode]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-y-t
|-
! Lemma
| bayata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bayatithi|bayatithi]] || [[word:bayatiji|bayatiji]] || [[word:bayatishi|bayatishi]] || [[word:bayati|bayati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayatuthuth|bayatuthuth]] || [[word:bayatujuj|bayatujuj]] || [[word:bayatushush|bayatushush]] || [[word:bayat|bayat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayatuthu|bayatuthu]] || [[word:bayatuju|bayatuju]] || [[word:bayatushu|bayatushu]] || [[word:bayatu|bayatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayatufuth|bayatufuth]] || [[word:bayatufuj|bayatufuj]] || [[word:bayatufush|bayatufush]] || [[word:bayatuf|bayatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bayatethe|bayatethe]] || [[word:bayateje|bayateje]] || [[word:bayateshe|bayateshe]] || [[word:bayate|bayate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayatothoth|bayatothoth]] || [[word:bayatojoj|bayatojoj]] || [[word:bayatoshosh|bayatoshosh]] || [[word:bayat|bayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayatotho|bayatotho]] || [[word:bayatojo|bayatojo]] || [[word:bayatosho|bayatosho]] || [[word:bayato|bayato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayatofoth|bayatofoth]] || [[word:bayatofoj|bayatofoj]] || [[word:bayatofosh|bayatofosh]] || [[word:bayatof|bayatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bayatĂŠthĂŠ|bayatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bayatĂŠjĂŠ|bayatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bayatĂŠshĂŠ|bayatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bayatĂŠ|bayatĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayatathath|bayatathath]] || [[word:bayatajaj|bayatajaj]] || [[word:bayatashash|bayatashash]] || [[word:bayat|bayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayatatha|bayatatha]] || [[word:bayataja|bayataja]] || [[word:bayatasha|bayatasha]] || [[word:bayata|bayata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayatafath|bayatafath]] || [[word:bayatafaj|bayatafaj]] || [[word:bayatafash|bayatafash]] || [[word:bayataf|bayataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bayatasha|bayatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobayatasha|gobayatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibayatasha|gokibayatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bayatnĂŒsha|bayatnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobayatnknĂŒsha|gobayatnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibayatnĂŒsha|gokibayatnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bayatshĂ«sha|bayatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobayatnkshĂ«sha|gobayatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibayatshĂ«sha|gokibayatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bayatrosha|bayatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobayatnkrosha|gobayatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibayatrosha|gokibayatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bayatmusha|bayatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobayatnkmusha|gobayatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayatmusha|gokibayatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bayatsherasha|bayatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobayatnksherasha|gobayatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibayatsherasha|gokibayatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bayatngasha|bayatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobayatnkngasha|gobayatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibayatngasha|gokibayatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bayatyasha|bayatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobayatnkyasha|gobayatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibayatyasha|gokibayatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bayatyamasha|bayatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobayatnkyamasha|gobayatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibayatyamasha|gokibayatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bayatnĂŒshĂ«sha|bayatnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobayatnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobayatnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibayatnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibayatnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bayatnĂŒrosha|bayatnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobayatnknĂŒrosha|gobayatnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibayatnĂŒrosha|gokibayatnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayatnĂŒmusha|bayatnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobayatnknĂŒmusha|gobayatnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayatnĂŒmusha|gokibayatnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bayatshĂ«nĂŒsha|bayatshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobayatnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobayatnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibayatshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibayatshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bayatshĂ«rosha|bayatshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobayatnkshĂ«rosha|gobayatnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibayatshĂ«rosha|gokibayatshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayatshĂ«musha|bayatshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobayatnkshĂ«musha|gobayatnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayatshĂ«musha|gokibayatshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bayatronĂŒsha|bayatronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobayatnkronĂŒsha|gobayatnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibayatronĂŒsha|gokibayatronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bayatroshĂ«sha|bayatroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobayatnkroshĂ«sha|gobayatnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibayatroshĂ«sha|gokibayatroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayatromusha|bayatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobayatnkromusha|gobayatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayatromusha|gokibayatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bayatmunĂŒsha|bayatmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobayatnkmunĂŒsha|gobayatnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibayatmunĂŒsha|gokibayatmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bayatmushĂ«sha|bayatmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobayatnkmushĂ«sha|gobayatnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibayatmushĂ«sha|gokibayatmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bayatmurosha|bayatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobayatnkmurosha|gobayatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibayatmurosha|gokibayatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bayat|bayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠt|bĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobayat|hobayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠyĂŠt|hobĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobayat|hohobayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠyĂŠt|hohobĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbayat|nĂŒbayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠyĂŠt|nĂŒbĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbayat|nĂŒnĂŒbayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠyĂŠt|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbayat|nĂŻbayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠyĂŠt|nĂŻbĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbayat|nĂŻnĂŻbayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠyĂŠt|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubayat|lubayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠyĂŠt|lubĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubayat|lulubayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠyĂŠt|lulubĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libayat|libayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠyĂŠt|libĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibayat|lilibayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠyĂŠt|lilibĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobayat|kobayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠyĂŠt|kobĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobayat|kokobayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠyĂŠt|kokobĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebayat|kebayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠyĂŠt|kebĂŠyĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebayat|kekebayat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠyĂŠt|kekebĂŠyĂŠt]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
